docket_entries.description: ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO NOV-06-19 AT 8:30 A.M. DEPT. 506
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,313.25 FILED BY ZEIDAN, SULEIMAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIBBY, CHRIS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-16-2019 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE REMARKS THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEIDAN, SULEIMAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIBBY, CHRIS

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00);REMARKS - THIS SERVICE WAS UNSUCCESSFUL BECAUSE DEFENDANT WAS NOT FOUND. ATTEMPTS TO SERVICE TO NO AVAIL. NO RESPONSE TO NOTICES TO CONTACT THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF ZEIDAN, SULEIMAN AS TO DEFENDANT LIBBY, CHRIS
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-16-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO NOV-06-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
